title: VLST Toolkit
description: Open-source framework for running virtual lung screening trials using digital human phantoms and CT simulation.

title: SYN-LUNGS Dataset
description: Synthetically generated lung CT volumes with annotated nodules, spanning diverse patient anatomies and acquisition protocols.

title: CPU-Index Evaluation Tool
description: Python package for computing the Comprehensive CT Protocol Utility Index — a task-based image quality metric.

title: DukeSeg Pre-trained Weights
description: Pre-trained model weights for weakly-supervised organ segmentation on chest and abdomen CT.
